schema: endpoints are outward-rounded decimal strings [lo,hi] preserving interval width; each placement: p, piece_sides [[a.lo,a.hi],[b.lo,b.hi]], host_sides [[A.lo,A.hi],[B.lo,B.hi]], fit_margin (certified lower bound >=0), kind; top-level handoff records Lemma 5.6A (next_prime, next_piece_sides, fringe_count, all_fringe_mature, minimum_long/short_side_excess). This is a reproducible transcript of the interval verifier.
